case_title: QUICKSILVER PRODUCTS INC. VS PRINTIME CORP.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $715.00 FILED BY QUICKSILVER PRODUCTS INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PRINTIME CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-31-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PRINTIME CORP.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QUICKSILVER PRODUCTS INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRINTIME CORP. $715.00 PRINCIPAL, $13.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $728.00, PLTF. TO RETURN T-SHIRTS BY 9/17/92 OR DEFT TO PICK UP T-SHIRT BY 9/17/92 UPON PYMT OF $715.00. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT PRINTIME CORP. HEARING SET FOR SEP-10-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF SEP-10-1992, GRANTED
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT PRINTIME CORP. HEARING SET FOR OCT-15-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF OCT-15-1992, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QUICKSILVER PRODUCTS INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRINTIME CORP. $365.00 PRINCIPAL, $13.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $378.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
